response.reasoning: Step 1: Minimum qualifications — the candidate holds a BS in Computer Science and has ~17-19 years of professional software experience (2006/2009 to present), so the 15-year bar and degree requirement are met. Step 2: Seniority match — the role is a director-level individual contributor (Principal Engineer) focused on AI strategy; the candidate's trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior Software Engineer with hands-on delivery roles, and shows no evidence of org-wide technical leadership, strategy setting, or advising strategic customers/partners. Step 3: AI depth — recent work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic-workflow tooling, which is relevant but recent and tool-level rather than 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated AI products or platforms.' No advanced degree in an AI field. Step 4: Preferred criteria — genuine entrepreneurial signal (founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map) and strong builder/code fluency across many stacks; some cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not cloud platform strategy at scale. Step 5: Overall — a strong, versatile senior/staff engineer with craftsmanship credentials and community teaching experience, but a substantial gap to a director-level AI strategy principal role in both scope and recognized AI standing.
strengths: 17+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
Strong builder fluency and knowledge-sharing track record (conference talks, workshops, open-source libraries)
concerns: No director/principal-level scope: career history is hands-on senior/staff delivery, not organization-level technical strategy
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused; lacks recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising executives, customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Seniority/scope gap vs. director-level IC role
Meets experience minimum with entrepreneurial and builder strengths

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum qualifications and brings genuine breadth, founder experience, and recent agentic-AI tooling exposure. However, the role demands director-level strategic influence and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products, which this résumé does not evidence; the fit is one to two levels below the target seniority and off-center from the AI strategy focus.
